paramTags.comment: the backing iterator. The {@link PeekingIterator} assumes ownership of this iterator, so users should cease making direct calls to it after calling this method.

returnTag.comment: Calls to the peek method with no intervening calls to next do not affect the iteration, and hence return the same object each time.
